definition: A gene in the ClinVar/MANE/GENCODE-linked mapped universe for which transcript-unit opportunity was enumerated in v4.
common_misread: All-mapped does not mean therapeutically suitable.

definition: A legacy 306-gene display/benchmark/high-detail subset retained for continuity, examples, and richer pages.
common_misread: The curated subset is not the main denominator and not a target list.

definition: A mapped gene-variant row derived from ClinVar pathogenic/likely pathogenic VCF records.
common_misread: A row is not a patient, allele frequency, or prevalence estimate.

definition: For a transcript unit, the fraction of gene-level ClinVar P/LP records falling in or downstream of that unit according to the unit definition.
common_misread: This is not patient coverage and not therapeutic rescue probability.

definition: A gene with sparse ClinVar P/LP record count where unit coverage can be computed but should not be overinterpreted.
common_misread: This is not a negative result.

definition: A pre-implementation replacement hypothesis such as single exon, adjacent exon block, or downstream-CDS implantation.
common_misread: A transcript unit is not a final molecular design.

definition: One transcript-unit row with coverage, donor size, coverage-to-size ratio, and related metrics.
common_misread: Opportunity rows are not unique genes and not final designs.

definition: A class where theoretical coverage may require a large donor or complex transcript context.
A support layer indicating future evidence needs and blocked claims.
common_misread: It is not a PA-mode recommender.
